phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove inizia il mercato alimentare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh ee-NEE-tsa eel mer-KAH-toh ah-lee-men-TAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il Parmigiano, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel par-mee-JAH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the counter.

responses.english: It is indicated on the counter.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprono i negozi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-proh-noh ee neh-GOHT-syee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può assaggiare la mortadella, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh see PWO ah-sah-JAH-reh lah MOR-tah-DEH-lah pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, può assaggiarla in alcuni negozi qui.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ POO-ò ah-ssahj-jee-AHR-lah EEN ahl-KOO-nee neh-GOH-tsee KW-ee
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can taste it in some shops here.

responses.english: Yes, you can taste it in some shops here.
responses.phonetic: SÌ POO-ò ah-ssahj-jee-AHR-lah EEN ahl-KOO-nee neh-GOH-tsee KW-ee
responses.french: Sì, può assaggiarla in alcuni negozi qui.
